title: Gabonna memory crystal
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gabonna memory crystals''' were the only data units that ran fast enough to power Class Five [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. They were used in [[Cesta security droid]]s. At the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] placed them on restriction. They could store massive amounts of information, and their unique crystalline structure allowed for unprecedented processing power. They glowed a faint blue in appearance, and had geometric fracture lines across their surfaces.

[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] offered [[Cestus Cybernetics]] a large sum of these crystals as payment for the production of the [[JK-13 security droid|Jedi Killer]] droids.

{{Stub}}
